title: Liability for debts
doc_html:
§548. Liability for debts

           Lands acquired under the provisions of this Subpart shall never become liable for the satisfaction of any debt contracted prior to issuance of patent therefor.
doc_text:
§548.  Liability for debts
Lands acquired under the provisions of this Subpart shall never become
liable for the satisfaction of any debt contracted prior to issuance of patent
therefor.
